companies.name: OpenAI
companies.description: AI research and deployment company focused on ensuring artificial general intelligence benefits all of humanity.

companies.name: Anthropic
companies.description: AI safety company working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

companies.name: Google DeepMind
companies.description: Google's AI research laboratory focused on developing artificial general intelligence.

companies.name: Meta AI
companies.description: Meta's AI research division focused on advancing the state of the art in artificial intelligence.

companies.name: Microsoft
companies.description: Technology company developing AI models and integrating AI into its products and services.

companies.name: xAI
companies.description: AI company founded by Elon Musk focused on understanding the true nature of the universe.

companies.name: Kuaishou
companies.description: Chinese technology company that developed the Kling AI video generation model.

companies.name: Ideogram AI
companies.description: Company focused on text-to-image generation with superior text rendering capabilities.

companies.name: Cursor
companies.description: Company developing an AI-powered code editor to make software development more efficient.

companies.name: Mistral AI
companies.description: French AI company developing large language models and AI assistants.

companies.name: DeepSeek
companies.description: AI company developing open-source language models and AI assistants.

companies.name: Alibaba Cloud
companies.description: Chinese technology company developing the Qwen family of AI models.

companies.name: Midjourney
companies.description: Company developing AI image generation technology.

companies.name: Leonardo AI
companies.description: Company developing AI image generation tools, acquired by Canva in July 2024.

companies.name: Butterfly Effect
companies.description: Company behind the Manus AI general agent, also known as the Monica team.

companies.name: Lovable
companies.description: Company developing an AI-powered product engineering assistant.

companies.name: StackBlitz
companies.description: Company behind Bolt.new, an AI-powered web development agent.

companies.name: Google Labs
companies.description: Google's experimental products division that developed Notebook LM.

companies.name: Perplexity
companies.description: Company developing an AI-powered answer engine and research assistant.

companies.name: Stability AI
companies.description: Company developing Stable Diffusion and other open-source AI models.

companies.name: Manus Team
companies.description: Team developing Manus, an AI agent for various tasks and applications.

categories.name: Language Models
categories.description: AI models focused on natural language processing and generation.

categories.name: Image Generation
categories.description: AI models that create images from text descriptions or other inputs.

categories.name: Video Generation
categories.description: AI models that create videos from text descriptions or images.

categories.name: Code Generation
categories.description: AI models or tools specialized in generating or assisting with code.

categories.name: Multimodal Models
categories.description: AI models that can process and generate multiple types of data (text, images, audio, etc.).

categories.name: AI Assistants
categories.description: AI models designed to assist with various tasks through conversation.

categories.name: Research Tools
categories.description: AI-powered tools designed for research, note-taking, and information analysis.

categories.name: Development Tools
categories.description: AI-powered tools designed for software and application development.

categories.name: AI Agents
categories.description: Autonomous AI systems that can perform tasks with minimal human intervention.

A multimodal large language model with 1.76 trillion parameters.

A model that OpenAI claims 'can reason like a human.'

The first Kling video generation model.

The beta version of Ideogram's image generation model.

An improved version of Ideogram with enhanced capabilities.
OpenAI's text-to-video model capable of generating realistic videos up to a minute long.
The first Mistral model with 7 billion parameters.
A larger Mistral model with improved capabilities.
The initial release of Le Chat, Mistral AI's assistant.
Le Chat released on iOS and Android with a Pro plan at $14.99/month.
The initial release of DeepSeek's language model series.
The second version of DeepSeek's language model.
A Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model with 671 billion parameters.
A model with performance comparable to OpenAI-o1, released under MIT License.
The initial release of DeepSeek's code-focused model.
The second version of DeepSeek's code-focused model.
The initial release of Qwen with 7 billion parameters.
A release with over 100 open-source models including base models, instruct models, and quantized models.
A model claimed to surpass DeepSeek V3 in performance.
A 32-billion-parameter reasoning model.
The initial release of Midjourney's image generation model.
The second version of Midjourney's image generation model.
The third version of Midjourney's image generation model.

An update with enhanced skin textures and improved human realism.
The initial release of Leonardo AI's image generation platform.
A major update to Leonardo AI's image generation user interface.
A new model with improved image generation capabilities.
The beta release of Manus, a general AI agent, in invitation-only preview phase.
The initial release of Lovable, an AI-powered product engineering assistant.
An update with faster and more precise visual editing capabilities.
An update allowing users to view and edit project code.
The initial release of Bolt.new, an AI-powered web development agent.
An update introducing the Visual Inspector feature.
The initial rollout of Notebook LM, an AI-powered research and note-taking tool.
An update with a new UI, audio interactivity, and a premium tier.
The initial release of Perplexity, an AI-powered answer engine.
An update introducing Perplexity Assistant for Android with multi-app integration and task automation.
An update introducing Deep Research, which can analyze hundreds of sources in minutes.
The initial release of ChatGPT, powered by GPT-3.5.
A premium subscription option for ChatGPT users.
ChatGPT updated to use GPT-4 for Plus subscribers.
ChatGPT updated with plugin support.

ChatGPT updated with the ability to create custom GPTs.

ChatGPT updated to use GPT-4o with enhanced intelligence and additional features for free users.
An AI-powered search prototype designed to answer user queries with direct answers.
